title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Bikanervala Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Bikanervala Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Bikanervala Advisory Limited in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
